Cleaner.Title: Dev Cleaner
Cleaner.Subtitle: Scan and rapidly clean node_modules, Rust target and Go / npm / Bun dev caches to free disk space.
Cleaner.Paths.Empty: No scan locations yet — pick a drive root or project folder to begin.
Cleaner.NoMatch: No matching results — adjust the search or filter.
Cleaner.Caches.Desc: Global caches of package managers and build tools. They are rebuilt automatically on the next install or build.
WM.Title: Window Manager
WM.Subtitle: Move or resize any window using a hotkey + mouse gesture.
WM.Enable.Label: Enable Window Manager
WM.Enable.Desc: Global mouse hook that intercepts hotkey + mouse events to move or resize windows.
WM.Hotkey.Label: Modifier Key
WM.Hotkey.Desc: Hold this key and drag the mouse to manipulate windows.
WM.DragMove.Label: Drag Shortcut
WM.DragMove.Desc: The currently active shortcut for moving windows.
WM.Usage.Move: Hold the modifier key, then hold the left mouse button and drag to move the window anywhere on screen.
WM.Usage.Resize: Hold the modifier key, then hold the right mouse button and drag to resize the window from the bottom-right corner.
Settings.Title: Settings
Settings.Subtitle: Configure ZTools to match your preferences.
Settings.Language.Label: Interface Language
Settings.Language.Desc: Choose display language. Restart may be required.
Settings.StartWithWindows.Label: Start with Windows
Settings.StartWithWindows.Desc: Launch ZTools automatically when Windows starts.
Settings.SilentStart.Label: Silent Start
Settings.SilentStart.Desc: When launched at startup, run in the background without showing the main window.
Settings.MinimizeToTray.Label: Minimize to Tray
Settings.MinimizeToTray.Desc: Keep ZTools running in the system tray when closed.
